title: Easy Daily Task List Dashboard

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Easy Daily Task List Dashboard

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/>
  <text x='20' y='40' font-size='24' fill='#C06C88'>Daily Tasks</text>
  <g transform='translate(20, 80)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='180' height='40' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
    <text x='20' y='20' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Search Tasks</text>
    <rect x='190' y='0' width='180' height='40' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
    <text x='210' y='20' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Toggle Dark Mode</text>
  </g>
  <rect x='20' y='200' width='360' height='80' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='30' y='220' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Task 1: Today, Low</text>
  <text x='30' y='240' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Task 2: Tomorrow, High</text>
  <text x='30' y='260' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Task 3: Today, High</text>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use the specified color palette.
Must implement a toggle-able dark mode.
Must include a search bar to filter tasks by name.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Easy Daily Task List Dashboard

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, search bar functionality, and dark mode toggle.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
